articles.title: LA Schools Say 'Enough!' to Too Much Screen Time
articles.summary: A mom got mad when her son was punished for not bringing his iPad to gym class. Now LA's huge school district is slashing screen time for all kids, especially the littlest ones. Other states are doing it too.

articles.title: Workers Around the World Say 'No' to Paying for War
articles.summary: On May Day, people in many countries marched for better pay and peace. They're angry because the Iran war is making food and gas more expensive. In Manila, protesters clashed with police near the U.S. Embassy.

articles.title: A Mega Trade Deal Just Started — and It Could Change What You Eat
articles.summary: After 25 years of talking, Europe and South America's Mercosur bloc finally started a huge trade deal. It covers 720 million people and $22 trillion. That means cheaper beef from Brazil, but some farmers are worried.
